agent_spec.task: Please search the document database for any records about 'compliance incident 3' and then look at the top results to understand what happened.

tools.description: Searches the document database for a given query string and returns the top_k most relevant documents, each with doc_id, title, and a short snippet.
Retrieves the full content of a document given its document ID. Returns the document's id, title, and full text.
